mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, creator_id, instance_id, status, last_heartbeat
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM retry_sharding
AND creator_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{creatorId}, '%')
AND instance_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{instanceId}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM retry_sharding
AND creator_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{creatorId}, '%')
AND instance_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{instanceId}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instance_id) FROM retry_sharding WHERE last_heartbeat > (NOW() - INTERVAL #{timeoutSeconds} SECOND) AND instance_id IS NOT NULL AND instance_id != ''
SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, COUNT(*) AS count FROM retry_sharding WHERE instance_id IS NOT NULL AND instance_id != '' GROUP BY instance_id

SELECT instance_id AS instanceId, last_heartbeat AS lastHeartbeat, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, last_heartbeat, NOW()) AS heartbeatDelay FROM retry_sharding WHERE instance_id IS NOT NULL AND instance_id != '' ORDER BY last_heartbeat DESC
